time.description: A time with a predefined time zone.

This type defines a time value based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#time. Fractional seconds with three decimals are mandatory. Leap seconds are not supported. Example values are '14:35:05.003'. The latter example is the recommended format.

timeZone.description: This specifies which predefined time zone to be used.

monthDayNumber.description: Monthly schedule definition by month day number.

offsetType.description: Offset to specify if day should count from start or end.

resourceNumber.description: The complete number to identify the resource. For an MSISDN-DCS (GSM standard 1800) this is CC + NDC + SN. For an MSISDN-PCS (GSM standard PCS 1900) this is CC + NPA + SN. For an IMSI this is MCC + MNC + MSIN. (CC = Country code, NDC = National destination code, NPA = Number planning area, SN = Subscriber number, MCC = Mobile country code, MNC = Mobile network code, MSIN = Mobile subscriber identification number).

productCorrelationId.description: Reference to the product(s) this resource is tied. Correlation id is never persisted.

items.description: A temporary correlation id with a request.

resourceSpecificationId.description: Resource specification definition by ID. Found in RMCA by fetching the latest RSS of type LRSS of type CommunicationIdentification and the numberingScheme equal to the given resourceType in this payload.

resourceSpecificationExternalId.description: Resource specification definition by external ID. Found in RMCA by fetching the latest RSS of type LRSS of type CommunicationIdentification and the numberingScheme equal to the given resourceType in this payload.

items.description: Common sub-data structure that contains a week day and start and end time for week day.

weekday.description: Number of the day of a week. Example is 1 for Monday.

start.description: The start time of weekday. Example is '14:35:05.003+01:00'.

end.description: The end time of weekday. Example is '14:35:05.003+01:00'.

disabledNotificationGroup.description: Represents a Notification Group used for e.g. end user notifications.

relatedPartyInteractionRole.description: The business interaction role which associates a party role (customer) with a contract.

items.description: The party interaction role is a business interaction role which associates a party role with a contract, i.e. with respect to a contract, a customer can play a certain role (e.g. Legal Contract Holder). Different customers can be associated to the same contract via different interaction roles. From the contract's perspective the roles must be unique. Different contracts can be associated with a customer via arbitrary roles.

id.description: Unique identifier of the PartyInteractionRole.

partyRoleId.description: Instance ID of the party role.

partyRoleExternalId.description: External identifier of the party role.

interactionRole.description: The role that a party plays with respect to a given contract, for example LegalContractHolder.
